abilities.name: Measured Response
abilities.description: When your Digimon is attacked, if you have not taken your turn yet this round, you may use a Free Action to grant your Digimon +3 to their Reliability for that attack only.

abilities.name: Tactical Restraint
abilities.description: Once per encounter as a Free Action on your turn, choose one enemy Digimon within 6 spaces. That enemy's Speed is treated as 2 lower when determining turn order next round.

abilities.name: Calculated Peace
abilities.requirements: At least 1 Row 1 ability, Friendship rank 4
abilities.description: Once per encounter as your Basic Action, you may attempt to de-escalate a non-boss enemy. Make a Rally skill check DN 16. On a success the enemy skips their next action. This does not work on enemies that have been attacked this encounter.

abilities.name: Cover Fire
abilities.requirements: At least 1 Row 1 ability, Friendship rank 4
abilities.description: Once per encounter when an ally Digimon within 4 spaces is targeted, your Digimon may make a single Basic Attack against that attacker as a Free Action before the attack resolves.

abilities.name: Last Resort
abilities.description: Once per encounter as your Basic Action, Henry's Digimon takes a completely defensive stance. Until the start of Henry's next turn all damage dealt to any allied Digimon within 3 spaces is reduced by your Friendship rank. Your Digimon cannot attack while the stance is active.

abilities.name: Momentai
abilities.description: Once per session as a Free Action, you may declare Momentai. All allies within 6 spaces who can hear you immediately remove one negative status effect.

abilities.name: The Hardest Kind of Strong
abilities.description: Once per session at the start of an encounter, before any turns begin, you may declare your intent not to initiate offensive action this encounter. While you have not attacked — your Digimon has not targeted an enemy with a damage-dealing move — all allied Digimon gain +2 to Reliability and +2 to their Love stat for damage reduction. The moment your Digimon deals damage the bonus ends.
